privileged_info_summary: The task uses rectangular images from Unsplash (800x600 and 800x450 JPEG formats). Primary image URL (photo-1506905925346) is valid and returns an 800x600 RGB image. Secondary fallback image URL (photo-1501594907352) is valid and returns an 800x450 RGB image. The task applies GIMP's Round Corners filter, which is a legitimate Script-Fu filter found under Filters → Decor → Round Corners in GIMP 2.10+. The filter creates rounded corners by making them transparent when applied to an image with an alpha channel. The verifier checks for: (1) corner transparency above 10%, (2) curved corner patterns via diagonal transparency gradients, (3) center content preservation (≥95% opaque in middle 60% of image), (4) consistent rounding across all four corners (transparency std < 0.3), and (5) corner radius between 5px and 30% of image's smaller dimension. Success requires meeting at least 4 of 5 criteria.
